hero.subtitle: Custom-built tools and data-driven coaching services for athletes seeking maximum precision in training and competition.

tools.title: Analysis Tools
tools.power_guide: Cycling pacing simulator. Power optimization and strategy for competitions.
tools.route_analyzer: Tactical route analysis with weather data, segments, and physiological demand.
tools.hrv_compare: Real-time HRV sensor comparison. Recovery and variability tracking.
tools.cpet_report: Automated CPET reports and AI-powered metabolic threshold analysis.
tools.restricted_desc: This tool is available only for authorized users. Contact us to request access.

about.label: The Founder
about.title: Luisma Gallego
about.bio_1: My approach combines cutting-edge exercise science with custom software development. I don't just analyze your data — I build the tools to interpret them better.
about.bio_2: With years of experience in both tech and endurance sports, my mission is to bridge the gap between data complexity and practical training execution.

services.title: Specialized Services
services.subtitle: Technology solutions and strategic consulting for businesses and professionals looking to harness the power of data and AI.
services.tools_desc: Development of dashboards, integrations, and automations tailored to your data and business operations needs.
services.consulting_desc: Personalized assessment of your current situation to provide the best Artificial Intelligence strategy applied to data analysis and business operations.
services.consulting_f4: Custom intervals MCP installation on LLM
services.training_desc: Specialized intervals.icu classes and Artificial Intelligence applied to data analysis in Intervals to get the most out of your training.

footer.tagline: Taking endurance training to the next level through rigorous data analysis and custom-built tools.

deephrv.title: DeepHRV
deephrv.tagline: Advanced cardiovascular analysis for demanding athletes
deephrv.subtitle: Professional mobile application combining Heart Rate Variability (HRV) monitoring with real-time electrocardiographic visualization. Built with advanced algorithms for elite athletes, coaches, and fitness professionals.
deephrv.disclaimer: DeepHRV is a fitness and wellness tool. It is not a medical device and does not replace professional healthcare advice.
deephrv.for_1: Endurance athletes looking to optimize training and recovery
deephrv.for_2: Professional coaches who need objective data
deephrv.for_3: Fitness professionals interested in cardiac monitoring
deephrv.for_4: Researchers in exercise physiology and sports performance
deephrv.monitoring_1: HRV via PPG camera with automatic adaptive calibration
deephrv.monitoring_2: Direct Polar H10 BLE connection for maximum accuracy
deephrv.monitoring_3: Real-time Butterworth algorithms with LP 3.5Hz filtering
deephrv.analysis_2: Exercise metrics: DFA α1, RMSSD, SDNN, pNN50, Baevsky Stress Index
deephrv.analysis_3: Irregular rhythm and artifact detection with compensatory pause analysis
deephrv.analysis_4: Irregular rhythm screening with 4 scientific consensus indicators
deephrv.visualization_1: Live ECG with standard grid and R-wave tracking
deephrv.visualization_2: Tachogram, Poincaré and real-time stress analysis
deephrv.visualization_4: Dual respiratory rate: RIFV + RIIV (PPG) and RIFV + EDR (Polar H10)
deephrv.integration_2: Multi-file CSV export: raw ECG, RR intervals, accelerometer, metrics
deephrv.integration_3: Custom fields: normalized HRV, CV RMSSD 7d, Z-score baseline 28 days
deephrv.advantage_desc: While HRV4Training, Kubios, and EliteHRV are limited to basic metrics, DeepHRV is the only solution that integrates:
deephrv.advantage_1: Real-time ECG visualization with irregular rhythm detection
deephrv.advantage_2: Irregular rhythm screening with advanced algorithms
deephrv.advantage_3: Dual respiratory rate analysis PPG and ECG-derived
deephrv.pro_2: Support for 10 live Polar H10 with real-time alerts
deephrv.pro_3: Web ECG viewer with telemetry capabilities
deephrv.value_proposition: The only tool that brings professional cardiovascular analysis from your pocket to your training center, with the precision elite athletes demand and the analytical depth professional coaches require.
